title: bertolonia × mirandaei
intro: Bertolonia × mirandaei is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Bertolonia marmorata and Bertolonia rosea, belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been shown to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bertolonia × mirandaei include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems.
